title: Section 378M
content: 1[378M. Concession etc., to be deemed to have been granted to Producer Company.--With effect from the date of transformation, all fiscal and other concessions, licences, benefits, privileges and exemptions granted to the inter-State co-operative society in connection with the affairs and business of the inter-State co-operative society under any law for the time being in force shall be deemed to have been granted to the Producer Company.]
